form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 11 at this track on March 28 over 1800m, 20 len behind Jilpunga with 51.5kg at $34.90. The start before that eased back early on 8th of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1700m, slow going 17 len behind Summer Party with 52.5kg at $28.90. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 11 at this track on March 21 over 1200m, 11 len behind Cheonmahoryeong carrying 52.5kg at $61. The run before that 7th of 11 at this track on February 1 over 1200m, 10 len behind Quantum K with 52.5kg at $86.60. Comes into this in ordinary form. Can't enthuse.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Anyang Gippeum carrying 54kg at $7.30. The race before that settled back and ran on when 6th of 10 at this track on February 28 over 1800m, 4 len behind Byeolkong carrying 52.5kg at $12. Well placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start ran last of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1400m, 18 len behind Anyang Gippeum carrying 53kg at $60.80. At only start last preparation ran last of 10 at this track on January 17 over 1600m, 32 len behind Scale King carrying 51kg at $46.10. Fitter but must improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at start, lay outwards considerably in the straight.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1800m, 0.5 len behind Lady Fox carrying 53.5kg at $14.40. The start before that 6th of 11 at this track on February 1 over 1800m, 6 len behind Lucky Boom carrying 52.5kg at $3.10. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.

Had its hindquarters bumped on jumping.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. At the latest run ran on from midfield and won by 0.5 len at this track March 7 over 1800m defeating Excellent Matta with 54kg at $6.50. The race before that got back early 6th of 11 at this track on January 31 over 1700m, 2 len behind Blood Mountain with 53kg at $14.20. No reason she cannot salute again.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after three months settled back and ran on when 8th of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1800m, 11 len behind Lady Fox carrying 52.5kg at $25.10. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at this track on June 23 2024 over 1200m, 10 len behind Fair Skies carrying 52kg at $41. Needs to do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at start. Crowded at 1050m, raced wide thereafter.
Slow into stride and ridden wide at turn into straight.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. At the latest run held ground to the line 3rd of 11 at this track on March 7 over 1800m, 2.25 len behind Lady Fox carrying 54kg at $50.50. Before that got back early 6th of 11 at this track on January 25 over 1800m, 7 len behind Black Satang carrying 53kg at $37.30. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at this track January 18 over 1700m, 15 len behind Dragon Killer carrying 52.5kg at $17.50. First up last campaign ninth of 11 at this track September 27 over 1800m, soft track; 11 len behind Black Satang with 53kg at $42.30. Cannot make a strong case.
